text: Following the earnings release, several analyst firms adjusted their positions on NVIDIA. Bank of America reset its price target after the earnings report. Deutsche Bank raised its price target to $220 on February 26. Morgan Stanley reiterated an Overweight rating on February 23, with analyst Joseph Moore maintaining a positive stance. Goldman Sachs had previously revised its Buy rating on February 5 with a $250 price target, expecting a beat and raise quarter.
